title: Case: Fraud detection (part 1)
focus: Real-time scoring with imbalanced labels + reviewer queue capacity.

items.label: Sketch sync features + cached aggregates + slower enrichment

interviewQuestions: How do you handle the cost imbalance between false positives and false negatives?
When would you separate the model from the rules engine vs combine them?
How do you bootstrap labels for a brand-new fraud type?
